name: simple-overlay
description: A fullscreen transparent overlay that displays a selected URL

scripts.make: node scripts/generate-icons.js && electron-forge make --platform win32 --arch x64 && electron-forge make --platform linux --arch x64 && electron-forge make --platform darwin --arch x64
scripts.make:win: node scripts/generate-icons.js && electron-forge make --platform win32 --arch x64
scripts.make:linux: node scripts/generate-icons.js && electron-forge make --platform linux --arch x64
scripts.make:mac: node scripts/generate-icons.js && electron-forge make --platform darwin --arch x64
